message:
fix: use raw SQL for cross-database dependency lookups (#2832)

Cross-database dependency queries (convoy tracking issues across rigs)
silently returned empty because bd dep list JOINs with the issues table
which fails across Dolt databases. Switch getTrackedIssues and
getEpicChildren to prefer bdDepListRawIDs (raw SQL against dependencies
table only) with fallback to bd dep list for older bd versions. Add test
database cleanup to prevent orphan accumulation.

Fixes #2832, partially addresses #2786 and #2624.

PR: #2902

Co-Authored-By: DreadPirateRobertz <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
